questions.question: Describe the difference between a connection-oriented and connectionless transport protocol. Provide an example of each. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the characteristics of both types of protocols and provide examples of their usage.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the Sequence Number (seq), Acknowledgement Number (ack), and Data Sequence Number (dseq) fields in a TCP segment? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of each field in ensuring reliable data transfer.

questions.question: A router is configured to use TCP port 80 for HTTP traffic and port 443 for HTTPS traffic. Describe how the router will handle incoming packets for these ports. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the process of how the router will identify and forward packets to the correct application.
